svg.title: Valkyrja Worker HTTP Lifecycle
svg.desc: Flow diagram showing the Valkyrja PHP framework worker HTTP lifecycle, from worker process start through bootstrap, parent freeze, per-request child container/application creation, dispatch, and loop-back.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What starts the Valkyrja worker process?')
sendPrompt('What does WorkerHttp::bootstrap do in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('What does bootstrapParentServices do in Valkyrja worker mode?')
sendPrompt('What does getData return in the Valkyrja worker bootstrap?')
sendPrompt('What does it mean for the parent container to be frozen in Valkyrja worker mode?')

svg.text: Per-request isolation — child discarded after each request

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does FrankenPHP deliver a request to Valkyrja worker mode?')
sendPrompt('What does WorkerHttp::handle do in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('How does ChildContainer work in Valkyrja worker mode?')
sendPrompt('How does ChildApplication work in Valkyrja worker mode?')
g.text: Owns child container, delegates to parent

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What request-scoped singletons are registered in Valkyrja worker mode?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja dispatch a request in worker mode?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja send the HTTP response in worker mode?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja discard the child container after each request?')
